title: Teaching at Oh, Scrap
excerpt: Last month I had the pleasure of teaching my minibook + film canister class at Oh, Scrap in Costa Mesa. It's always nice to support a local scrapbook store as they are (unfortunately) far and few between these days. The…
body:
Last month I had the pleasure of teaching my minibook + film canister class at Oh, Scrap in Costa Mesa. It's always nice to support a local scrapbook store as they are (unfortunately) far and few between these days. The class went off without a hitch and my students were lovely, as always. Here are a few photos from the day:

During the class, my mom noticed a girl who came in with a book she had made for a graduation present using my products. Turns out she wanted to sign up for the class but it coincided with the graduation party she was on her way to.

Be sure to check out my upcoming events here!
